# Authorization Matrix

**Coverage stats**: 26 request/operation boundaries discovered | 0 non-public boundaries with no applicable guard detected | 19 boundaries taking object/source identifier parameters.

**Coverage gaps**: No inbound HTTP/GraphQL/gRPC/WebSocket/queue routes were detected. CI workflow authorization depends on GitHub branch protection, repository roles, and secret availability, which are outside source-code verification. The published `dist/cli.mjs` bundle was not present, so this matrix is source-level (`src/**/*.ts` plus `bin/cli.mjs`/workflows). See `piolium/authz-coverage-gaps.md`.

**Frameworks covered**: Node.js/TypeScript CLI (`bin/cli.mjs`, `src/cli.ts`), outbound HTTP/fetch client operations, native git transport, and GitHub Actions workflows. Standard web-route detectors for Express/Nest/GraphQL/proto/gRPC returned no routes.

| # | Method | Path / Topic / RPC | Handler (file:line) | Actor / Roles | Layer-1 Guard | In-body Authz / Actual Checks | Object-ID Param | Ownership Check? | Tenant Filter? | Expected Scope |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | CLI | `skills` (no command; banner) | `src/cli.ts:883-888` | Any local process invoking the binary | Command dispatch only | Public informational output; no filesystem or network mutation. | — | N/A | N/A | public |
| 2 | CLI | `skills --help` / `-h` | `src/cli.ts:948-950` | Any local process | Command dispatch only | Public usage output only. | — | N/A | N/A | public |
| 3 | CLI | `skills --version` / `-v` | `src/cli.ts:952-954` | Any local process | Command dispatch only | Public version output only. | — | N/A | N/A | public |
| 4 | CLI | `skills add|install|a|i <source>` | `src/cli.ts:913-919` → `src/add.ts:895` | Local operator; optional git/GitHub credentials in environment | CLI switch + option parser; no app identity model | Parses source (`src/add.ts:941-955`), blocks `openclaw/*` unless explicit risk flag (`src/add.ts:958-975`), validates agent names, prompts for skill/agent/scope/mode and final confirmation unless `-y` (`src/add.ts:1471-1478`), writes only through installer path sanitization/OS permissions. | `source`, `ref`, `subpath`, `--skill`, `--agent` | Same local OS user controls `cwd`/home target; installer uses `sanitizeName`/`isPathSafe`; remote repo access delegated to git/GitHub. | N/A | self |
| 5 | CLI | `skills find|search|f|s [query]` | `src/cli.ts:895-901` → `src/find.ts:270` | Local operator; public search caller | CLI switch only | Non-interactive mode prints public search results; interactive selection calls `runAdd()` with selected `source`/`skill` (`src/find.ts:339`), inheriting row 4 install checks. | Selected `source`/`skill` in interactive install path | Public search has no owned resource; install path inherits local OS/installer checks. | N/A | public |
| 6 | CLI | `skills list|ls [-g] [-a agent] [--json]` | `src/cli.ts:939-941` → `src/list.ts:68` | Local operator | CLI switch only | Parses scope/agent filters, rejects invalid agents (`src/list.ts:68-88`), lists project or global skill dirs through filesystem permissions. | `--agent`, scope (`--global`) | Same local OS user reads `cwd` or home skill directories. | N/A | self |
| 7 | CLI | `skills remove|rm|r [skills]` | `src/cli.ts:922-931` → `src/remove.ts:23` | Local operator | CLI switch + `--help` special case | Scans installed project/global dirs, validates agent filters, selects exact installed skill names, prompts confirmation unless `-y` (`src/remove.ts:124-139`), removes sanitized canonical/agent paths (`src/remove.ts:156-202`). | skill names, `--agent`, scope (`--global`) | Same local OS user; path selection goes through `getCanonicalPath`/`getInstallPath`/`sanitizeName`; deletion subject to OS permissions. | N/A | self |
| 8 | CLI | `skills update|check|upgrade [skills...]` | `src/cli.ts:943-946` → `src/cli.ts:811` | Local operator | CLI switch only | Resolves project/global/both scope by explicit flags, prompt, or non-interactive auto-detect (`src/cli.ts:420-469`); reads local/global locks, checks GitHub tree hashes, then self-spawns scoped `skills add ... -y` (`src/cli.ts:650-676`, `src/cli.ts:758-773`). | skill filter, lock `source`/`ref`/`skillPath` | Same local OS user owns lock files/skill dirs; remote repo access delegated to GitHub/git. Source-controlled lock trust was already filed as P4 supply-chain, not an authz endpoint bypass. | N/A | self |
| 9 | CLI | `skills init [name]` | `src/cli.ts:903-906` → `src/cli.ts:222` | Local operator | CLI switch only | Creates `<name>/SKILL.md` or `./SKILL.md`; refuses overwrite if target file exists (`src/cli.ts:229-237`). | skill directory/name | Same local OS user writes within current working directory; OS permissions enforce filesystem access. | N/A | self |
| 10 | CLI | `skills experimental_install` | `src/cli.ts:908-910` → `src/install.ts:17` | Local operator / project maintainer running restore | CLI switch only | Reads project `skills-lock.json`; groups entries by source and calls `runAdd(..., yes: true, agent: universalAgents)` (`src/install.ts:17-69`); node_modules entries go through `runSync(..., yes: true)` (`src/install.ts:74-87`). | lock skill names and sources | Same local/project OS context; lockfile trust is source-control policy, not multi-tenant app authz. | N/A | team |
| 11 | CLI | `skills experimental_sync [-a agent] [-y] [--force]` | `src/cli.ts:933-936` → `src/sync.ts:132` | Local operator / project maintainer | CLI switch only | Scans `node_modules` for `SKILL.md`, validates agent names, prompts confirmation unless `-y` (`src/sync.ts:302-311`), installs project-scoped skills and updates local lock. | package names, skill names, `--agent` | Same local/project OS context; project dependencies are trusted by project policy. | N/A | team |
| 12 | Git transport | `git clone <url> [--branch ref]` | `src/git.ts:25` | Local operator plus configured git credentials | Native git authentication/authorization; app sets `GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0` | Uses shallow clone, optional branch, LFS filters disabled; private repo access is denied by git remote if credentials lack rights (`src/git.ts:25-117`). | git URL, `ref` | Delegated to git server/credentials; temp cleanup constrained to OS temp (`src/git.ts:120-130`). | N/A | public / role:git-credential |
| 13 | GET | `https://api.github.com/repos/{owner}/{repo}` | `src/source-parser.ts:67` | GitHub anonymous or credentialed caller | GitHub API authorization | Used only to determine privacy for telemetry/find display; returns null/skip on access failure (`src/source-parser.ts:67-83`). | `owner`, `repo` | Delegated to GitHub repo permissions. | N/A | public / role:github-token |
| 14 | GET | `https://api.github.com/repos/{ownerRepo}/git/trees/{ref}?recursive=1` | `src/blob.ts:84` | GitHub anonymous or credentialed caller | GitHub API authorization; optional bearer token | Fetches tree for blob install/update; token optional; failures return null/fallback (`src/blob.ts:84-123`). | `ownerRepo`, `ref` | Delegated to GitHub repo permissions. | N/A | public / role:github-token |
| 15 | GET | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/{ownerRepo}/{branch}/{skillMdPath}` | `src/blob.ts:249` | Anonymous public raw GitHub fetch | GitHub/raw host public-resource controls | Fetches public `SKILL.md` frontmatter for blob path; returns null on non-OK/error (`src/blob.ts:249-265`). | `ownerRepo`, `branch`, `skillMdPath` | Public raw content only; private access not expected via this endpoint. | N/A | public |
| 16 | GET | `https://skills.sh/api/download/{owner}/{repo}/{slug}` | `src/blob.ts:270` | Public skills.sh caller | skills.sh service-side controls | Fetches snapshot for allowlisted GitHub owners selected in `runAdd`; URL path components are encoded (`src/blob.ts:270-287`). | `owner`, `repo`, `slug` | Public snapshot service; no user-owned resource in this client. | N/A | public |

| 19 | GET | `{base}/.well-known/skills/index.json` (legacy fallback) | `src/providers/wellknown.ts:96` | Public well-known endpoint caller | Remote origin controls index availability | Same validation as preferred path; tried after preferred path/path-relative variants. | `baseUrl` | Public origin-scoped discovery; no local object ownership until install path. | N/A | public |

| 22 | GET | `https://add-skill.vercel.sh/audit?source=...&skills=...` | `src/telemetry.ts:97` | CLI client to advisory service | Public advisory service | Best-effort advisory fetch; timeout and errors do not block install (`src/telemetry.ts:97-122`). | `source`, `skills` | Public advisory lookup; no user-owned server resource. | N/A | public |
| 23 | GET | `https://add-skill.vercel.sh/t?...` | `src/telemetry.ts:129` | CLI client to telemetry service | Local opt-out env; service-side controls | Telemetry disabled by `DISABLE_TELEMETRY`/`DO_NOT_TRACK`; CI flag added; private GitHub installs are skipped by caller when privacy is known (`src/telemetry.ts:73-79`, `src/telemetry.ts:129-164`). | event metadata/source/skills | Privacy gating is caller-side; no remote object ownership in this client. | N/A | public |
| 24 | GitHub Actions event | CI: `pull_request`, `push` to `main` | `.github/workflows/ci.yml:3` | PR author for read-only checks; maintainer for push | GitHub workflow trigger and repository permissions | No publish secrets or write steps in CI workflow; runs checkout/install/build/test. | — | Delegated to GitHub PR/push permissions. | N/A | public / role:maintainer |
| 25 | GitHub Actions event | Publish: `push` to `main`/`v*`, `workflow_dispatch` | `.github/workflows/publish.yml:3` | Repo maintainer/admin with release rights | GitHub workflow trigger, `contents: write`, OIDC, `NPM_TOKEN` secret availability | Publishes to npm and creates release only in this token-bearing workflow; actual actor authorization is GitHub branch protection/repository roles/secrets (`.github/workflows/publish.yml:23-25`, `.github/workflows/publish.yml:118-151`). | — | Delegated to GitHub repo roles, protected refs, and npm token policy. | N/A | admin |
| 26 | GitHub Actions event | Agents CI: `pull_request`/`push` touching `src/agents.ts` | `.github/workflows/agents.yml:3` | PR author for validate job; maintainer push for sync job | GitHub workflow trigger; sync job gated to push on main | Validation runs on PR/push; commit/push sync job has explicit condition `github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'` (`.github/workflows/agents.yml:41-43`). | — | Delegated to GitHub PR/push permissions. | N/A | public / role:maintainer |

## Systematic Sweep Result

- **Missing guard:** none meeting threshold. Public informational/search/discovery operations are intentionally public; mutating CLI operations run under the local OS user and use prompts, scope flags, path sanitization, and filesystem/git/GitHub authorization rather than an application role model.
- **Inconsistent guard:** no web controller/route groups exist; CLI mutating groups consistently use local prompts/`-y` override semantics.
- **IDOR/BOLA / tenant isolation:** no database-backed user, tenant, or row-id access patterns were found.
- **Vertical privilege escalation:** no app roles or admin endpoints exist; publish privileges are delegated to GitHub repository roles and branch protection.
- **Mass assignment / overposting:** no request-body-to-ORM handlers exist.
- **Public variant / optional identity bypass:** no private/public route variants or optional authenticated identities exist.
